mapper.select: SELECT ap.account_id AS accountId, a.broker_name AS brokerName, ap.stock_id AS stockId, s.srtn_cd AS stockCode, s.itms_nm AS stockName, s.mrkt_ctg AS market, ap.quantity AS quantity, ap.cost_amount AS totalBuyAmount, ap.avg_price AS averageBuyPrice, sm.current_price AS currentPrice FROM account_position ap JOIN account a ON a.account_id = ap.account_id JOIN stock_item_master s ON s.id = ap.stock_id LEFT JOIN stock_market_price sm ON sm.stock_id = ap.stock_id WHERE a.member_id = #{memberId} AND a.is_active = 1 AND ap.quantity > 0
